rag_rules: Repair validator diagnostics by adding missing annex blocks or fixing syntax errors without changing unrelated architecture
generic_rules: Use AGREE annex blocks to encapsulate contracts and bindings
Ensure all identifiers in contracts are visible in the current scope
Place assumptions and guarantees in the appropriate component type or implementation annex
Use valid AGREE scalar types (int, real, bool) for declarations
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annex blocks use the syntax `annex agree {** ... **};`
Stateful equations should use initialized temporal recurrence
Branching logic should use nested `if ... then ... else`
Use logical operators such as `and`, `or`, `not(...)`, and implication `=>`
anti_patterns: Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts
Do not use implementation-only paths in component type annexes
Do not add architecture to fix unresolved references; remove invalid clauses instead
irrelevant_topics: type scope range assumption and guarantee
